title: agrostis castellana subsp. tricuspidata
intro: Agrostis castellana subsp. tricuspidata, also known as Tricuspida bent-grass, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Agrostis castellana subsp. tricuspidata include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions, which are used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions with other medications.
